projectDescription: A CLI tool to define and install your tech stack presets with one command
keyFeatures: Define reusable package presets in JSON config files
Install entire tech stacks with a single command
Support for npm, pnpm, yarn, and bun package managers
Handle both interactive and non-interactive package installations
Dry-run mode to preview commands before execution
Version pinning and custom flags support
publicApiSurface: pm-auto uninstall <presets...> - Remove packages from presets
pm-auto list - List all available presets
pm-auto config <path> - Set configuration file path
pm-auto config-path - Display current config path
--add-flags flag - Append custom flags to install commands
